memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Interpolator *interp, SYN_Vector3F start, SYN_Vector3F target, float feedrate, float max_accel, float max_jerk, float step_res)
memberdef.name: syn_interpolator_plan_linear

parameterdescription.para: Spatial resolution per step (units per step, e.g. 0.001mm).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Interpolator *interp, SYN_Vector3F start, SYN_Vector3F target, SYN_Vector3F center_offset, bool is_cw, float feedrate, float max_accel, float max_jerk, float step_res)
memberdef.name: syn_interpolator_plan_circular

briefdescription.para: Plan a Circular 2D arc move in XY plane.

parameterdescription.para: Center offset relative to start (I = center.x - start.x, J = center.y - start.y).
true for Clockwise, false for Counter-Clockwise.
Spatial resolution per step (units per step).

briefdescription.para: Advance the interpolator by one discrete step.

simplesect.para: true if move active and advanced, false if move complete.

briefdescription.para: Evaluate the interpolator at a specific time offset t seconds.

parameterdescription.para: Time offset from start of move in seconds.
Out: Position vector at time t.
Out: Velocity vector at time t (optional, can be NULL).

simplesect.para: true if t <= move total time.

briefdescription.para: Coordinated multi-axis linear & circular arc trajectory interpolator implementation.
